items.summary_en: OpenAI newsroom changed. Most visible article: "Introducing Trusted Contact In Chatgpt".
items.evidence_excerpt: title=Introducing Trusted Contact in ChatGPT published=Thu, 07 May 2026 00:00:00 GMT link=https://openai.com/index/introducing-trusted-contact-in-chatgpt description=Introducing Trusted Contact in ChatGPT, an optional safety feature that notifies someone you trust if serious self-harm concerns are detected. title=Uber uses OpenAI to help people earn smarter and book faster link=https://openai.com/index/uber description=Uber uses OpenAI to power AI assistants and voice features that help drivers earn smarter and riders book faster across a global real-time marketplace. title=GPT-5.5 Instant System Card published=Tue, 05 May 2026 10:00:00 GMT link=https://openai.com/index/gpt-5-5-instant-system-card description=
diff_excerpt: description=Explore new realtime voice models in the OpenAI API that can reason, translate, and transcribe speech, enabling more natural and intelligent voice experiences.
-title=Singular Bank helps bankers move fast with ChatGPT and Codex
+description=Introducing Trusted Contact in ChatGPT, an optional safety feature that notifies someone you trust if serious self-harm concerns are detected.
+title=Uber uses OpenAI to help people earn smarter and book faster
-description=Singular Bank built Singularity, an internal assistant using ChatGPT and Codex to help bankers save 60–90 minutes daily on meeting prep, portfolio analysis, and follow-up.
+description=Uber uses OpenAI to power AI assistants and voice features that help drivers earn smarter and riders book faster across a global real-time marketplace.
title=Unlocking large scale AI training networks with MRC (Multipath Reliable Connection)
description=GPT-5.5 Instant updates ChatGPT’s default model with smarter, more accurate answers, reduced hallucinations, and improved personalization controls.
title=New ways to buy ChatGPT ads
description=OpenAI is available at FedRAMP Moderate authorization for ChatGPT Enterprise and the OpenAI API, enabling secure AI adoption for U.S. federal agencies.
-title=The next phase of the Microsoft OpenAI partnership
-description=OpenAI and Microsoft announce an amended agreement that simplifies the partnership, adds long-term clarity, and supports continued AI innovation at scale.
